author: Carlos Tasada
message:
feat: Remove deprecated properties from IAccount interface and fix JSON property name typo

- Removed `IsDayPatternTrader` and `DayTradeCount` properties from the `IAccount` interface due to changes in the Alpaca Trading API.
- Fixed a typo in the JSON property name for `NonMarginableBuyingPower` to ensure correct population.
- Updated compatibility suppressions to reflect the removal of the deprecated properties.

Disables code coverage temporarily

Temporarily disables code coverage in the CI pipeline.

This change addresses an issue with the code coverage tool
and allows the pipeline to continue running tests and builds
without generating coverage reports. Coverage reporting will
be re-enabled once the underlying issue is resolved.

author: Oleg Rakhmatulin
message:
docs: Clarify crypto perpetual futures support (Issue #772)

Provides comprehensive documentation clarifying that Alpaca Markets currently supports spot crypto trading only. The CryptoPerpetual enum exists as preparatory infrastructure for potential future functionality.

đź“‹ **Documentation Added:**
- `CRYPTO_PERPETUALS.md` - Complete explanation of current crypto support status
- XML documentation updates for IAlpacaCryptoDataClient and IAlpacaCryptoStreamingClient
- AssetClass.CryptoPerpetual enum documentation with preparatory note
- Usage example clarification in MeanReversionWithCrypto

âś… **Key Clarifications:**
- Alpaca Markets supports spot crypto trading only (BTC/USD, ETH/USD, etc.)
- Crypto perpetual futures are not currently available
- CryptoPerpetual enum (JSON: "crypto_perp") is preparatory infrastructure
- Existing crypto clients work perfectly for spot trading

đź“Š **Research Findings:**
- No active crypto perpetual futures trading at Alpaca Markets
- No perpetual-specific API endpoints available
- Existing IAlpacaCryptoDataClient and IAlpacaCryptoStreamingClient handle spot trading only
- Future-ready architecture when/if Alpaca adds perpetual futures

đźŽŻ **Impact:**
- Eliminates client confusion about crypto perpetual support
- Sets clear expectations for current crypto functionality
- Provides guidance for users needing perpetual futures trading
- Completes Issue #772 documentation requirements

đź¤– Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Oleg Rakhmatulin
message:
feat: Add order imbalance streaming support (Issue #770)

Implements comprehensive order imbalance data streaming for pre-market opening and closing auctions, enabling sophisticated trading strategies around auction periods.

đźš€ **New Features:**
- `IOrderImbalance` interface with ReferencePrice, PairedShares, ImbalanceShares, ImbalanceSide, AuctionType
- `GetOrderImbalanceSubscription()` method in `IAlpacaDataStreamingClient`
- WebSocket channel support with "imbalances" channel ("i")
- JSON deserialization with `JsonOrderImbalance` data model

đź”§ **Extension Methods:**
- `GetOrderImbalanceSubscription()` with params and IEnumerable overloads
- `SubscribeOrderImbalanceAsync()` with 3 overloads for disposable subscriptions
- Full reconnection wrapper support

âś… **Quality Assurance:**
- Unit tests following existing patterns (AlpacaDataStreamingClientTest.Imbalances.cs)
- API compatibility resolved with suppression files
- All existing tests pass
- Comprehensive XML documentation

đź“Š **Impact:**
- Completes #2 priority feature for SDK 8.0.0 final release
- Enables advanced auction-based trading strategies
- Follows exact same patterns as existing LULD streaming
- Based on NYSE order imbalance specifications

đź¤– Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Oleg Rakhmatulin
message:
feat: complete Options REST API with missing endpoints

Add the two missing options data endpoints to achieve full API completeness:

- ListLatestBarsAsync: Get latest bars for option contracts
- Historical quotes: Complete IHistoricalQuotesClient implementation

Changes:
â€˘ Add HistoricalOptionQuotesRequest following existing patterns
â€˘ Update IAlpacaOptionsDataClient with missing interface and method
â€˘ Implement ListLatestBarsAsync in AlpacaOptionsDataClient
â€˘ Update PublicAPI.Shipped.txt with new public APIs
â€˘ Add comprehensive unit tests (Latest.cs and Quotes.cs)
â€˘ Document API compatibility resolution in CLAUDE.md
â€˘ Generate CompatibilitySuppressions.xml for new APIs

All tests passing (22/22). Options REST API now matches full Alpaca specification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Oleg Rakhmatulin
message:
Removes API discrepancies analysis

Removes outdated and incomplete documentation regarding API discrepancies and feature analysis.

author: Oleg Rakhmatulin
message:
Add options real-time streaming support (Issue #721)

- Add IAlpacaOptionsStreamingClient interface for options streaming
- Implement AlpacaOptionsStreamingClient with MessagePack support
- Add AlpacaOptionsStreamingClientConfiguration with feed selection
- Support both Indicative (free) and OPRA (premium) feeds
- Add Environment factory methods for easy client creation
- Add ConfigurationExtensions.GetClient() for options streaming
- Add comprehensive unit tests with mocking support
- Add usage example and documentation
- Update PublicAPI.Shipped.txt with new public interfaces
- Complete options ecosystem: REST + Streaming + Trading

Technical improvements:
- Eliminate code duplication by leveraging base class methods
- Reuse existing JsonRealTime* data models instead of duplicates
- Proper MessagePack configuration in all constructors
- Clean API design with internal implementation details
- Remove unnecessary 'new' keyword usage
- Enhanced inheritance guidelines in CLAUDE.md

Features:
- Real-time options trades subscription
- Real-time options quotes (bid/ask) subscription
- Options bars subscription (minute, daily, updated)
- WebSocket connection to wss://stream.data.alpaca.markets/v1beta1/{feed}
- MessagePack protocol support for efficient data transfer
- Consistent API design with existing streaming clients

đź¤– Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Oleg Rakhmatulin
message:
Adds CLAUDE.md for SDK context and guidelines

Adds a CLAUDE.md file to provide general information,
development notes, architecture overview, and CI/CD
configuration for the .NET SDK. This file serves as a
central reference point for developers working with the
Alpaca Markets API. It's excluded from builds by `.gitignore`

The solution file is updated to include this new file.
